description_long: This is a medium-sized, L-shaped wooden desk with a light oak finish, featuring a smooth, slightly curved main work surface. On the right side, there is a set of three vertically stacked drawers with round wooden knobs, providing storage for office supplies or documents. The left side includes a larger cabinet with a door, likely for storing larger items or a computer tower, and an open shelf above it. The desk has a modesty panel at the back and a horizontal support beam connecting the two sides for added stability. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for both professional and home environments. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, and the construction appears sturdy and well-crafted.
description: A light oak L-shaped desk with three drawers, a cabinet, and an open shelf, featuring a smooth, curved work surface and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the three drawers on the right, the open shelf and cabinet on the left, and the curved desktop.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the side panel, and the drawer handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the modesty panel, the open shelf, and the cabinet door, with the drawers less visible.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the solid side panel, the open shelf beneath the desktop, and the overall length of the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features the three drawers and the open leg space, with the curved desktop edge providing ergonomic access; the back has a modesty panel and storage compartments.
